title: CryptoEventClassification
description: LLM classification output for a crypto price anomaly event

event_reference.description: Unique identifier linking this classification back to the original anomaly event (e.g. anomaly timestamp or ID)

classification.description: Primary classification of the price anomaly

severity.description: Severity score: 1-3 minor wick/dip, 4-6 significant move (>5%), 7-8 major event (>15%), 9-10 catastrophic (>50% or exchange collapse)

confidence.description: Confidence in the classification, from 0.0 (uncertain) to 1.0 (certain)

rationale.description: Detailed reasoning for the classification, citing specific evidence from the derivatives context

news_relevance.description: Estimated lag of news relevance. null if no RSS context was provided.
